local_adaptation_notes: Cycling culture context: ciclismo de carretera en España — Pirineos, Sierra Nevada, rutas costeras
Use local cycling terminology naturally (e.g. Rennrad, fietsbril, vélo, ciclismo)
Avoid literal translations of brand-y phrases like 'cycling sunglasses' — use what locals search for
Pricing: use current commercial config (no hard-coded values)
